name: GraniteShares 1x Short FAANG Daily ETC
summary: GraniteShares 1x Short FAANG Daily ETC is an exchange-traded commodity (ETC) designed to provide the inverse (-1x) daily performance of an index composed of FAANG stocks (Facebook/Meta, Apple, Amazon, Netflix, and Google/Alphabet). This ETC is designed for short-term trading and not for long-term investment. The company is based in the UK.
